name: Joshua Redman
abstract: Joshua Redman (born February 1, 1969) is an American jazz saxophonist and composer. He is the son of jazz saxophonist Dewey Redman (1931–2006).

about_quotes.speaker: Adrian Cunningham
about_quotes.evidence: you’ll be a jazz star. That’s kind of the under-riding message. It’s not come through jazz school and be a working musician doing wedding gigs, you know? It’s come through jazz school, we’ll teach you the tools to be the next Joshua Redman, or the next whoever.
about_quotes.doc_title: Adrian Cunningham interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 31, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Smulyan
about_quotes.evidence: Joshua Redman, Chris Potter, Don Byas, Frank Wess, and the list goes on, Ben Webster, Coleman Hawkins, Georgie Auld, they all play the tenor saxophone but they all have —

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: The saxophone section had Clarence Clemons on tenor, Grover Washington Jr. on baritone sax, Joshua Redman on tenor... I was really glad to be a part of that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: It was all-star. Metheny, Joshua [Redman]. ... So it’s me, Garzone, I think Josh, and Michael. We did Impressions. We did India.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: Instead they went to talk to Joshua Redman, who said that he heard John Coltrane on a record when he was 14. So what? How important is that historically? What has that got to do with anything? That made me sick about that, the people that they chose to be their consultants.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Josephine Davies
about_quotes.evidence: My example I suppose, funny enough I was listening to this yesterday because I’m taking down one of the tunes on this album which is “Spirit of the Moment” which is Joshua Redman’s album – live album at the Vanguard
about_quotes.doc_title: Josephine Davies interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 14, 2025
